brand_primary.description: Deep Emerald - the core brand color representing freshness and trust.

brand_secondary.description: Warm Terracotta - for high-contrast accents and secondary CTAs.

background_base.description: Bone White - the overarching background color to avoid clinical white.

surface.description: Pure white for cards and floating elements.

surface_muted.description: Muted green-tinted background for active states or subtle sections.

text_primary.description: Deep Charcoal for readable headings and body text.

text_muted.description: Soft Gray for secondary info and placeholders.

heading.description: Distinctive, authoritative but fresh sans-serif. Load via Fontshare or use 'Outfit' via Google Fonts as fallback.

body.description: Clean, modern, and highly legible for long-form data and dashboards.

grid_strategy.marketing: Mode A: The Bento Grid (asymmetrical, wide gaps gap-8). Use for Home and PG Listing.
grid_strategy.dashboard: Mode B: Control Room Grid (dense, grid-cols-4, tight gaps gap-6). Use for Admin/Owner panels.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous. Cards must use p-6 or p-8. Sections use py-24.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inputs, rounded-full for buttons and badges.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(4,120,87,0.06)] for default, shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(4,120,87,0.12)] for hover states.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-gray-200. Must be sticky at top.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-emerald-700 text-white hover:bg-emerald-800 transition-all rounded-full px-6 py-2. Secondary: border border-emerald-200 text-emerald-800 hover:bg-emerald-50.
components.cards: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults modified to rounded-xl, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/50, solid white bg.
components.badges: Soft background. Available: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700. Full/Booked: bg-orange-50 text-orange-700.

iconography.usage: Use stroke-width 2. Keep sizing consistent (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for feature callouts).

animation.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Page load staggers for lists (e.g., PG listings). No heavy 3D, keep it snappy and UI-focused.

hero_building.description: Modern apartment building exterior. Use as the hero section background or featured image.

pg_room_1.description: Cozy hostel room with bunk beds. Use in PG Listing cards.

pg_room_2.description: Warmly lit dorm room. Use in PG Details image gallery.

pg_room_3.description: Bright minimal bedroom for single-room PGs.

mess_food_1.description: Delicious Indian thali. Showcasing mess food quality on Home or PG Details.

mess_food_2.description: Traditional thali top view. Use in Mess Menu sections.

students.description: Group of diverse students. Great for 'About Us', 'Testimonials', or Auth page split-screen.

avatar_user.description: Smiling young woman. Use as dummy avatar for the user profile.

pages.home: Hero section with a bold heading, an elevated floating search bar (Location, Price, Type), followed by a bento-grid of 'Featured Properties'. Use generative spacing.
pages.pg_listing: Left sidebar for filters (budget, amenities, sharing type). Right side is a responsive grid of PG Cards. Each card has an image carousel (if possible) or single image, title, location, price, and 'View Details' button.
pages.pg_details: Top: Asymmetrical image bento grid (1 large, 2 small stacked). Below: Two-column layout (content 70%, sticky booking card 30%). Content includes Tabs for Overview, Amenities, Mess Menu, Reviews.
pages.auth: Login/Signup. Split-screen layout: left side is a clean, minimal Shadcn form, right side is the 'students' image with a soft emerald gradient overlay. Use mock auth saving role to localStorage.
pages.my_bookings: List view or dense card view of user's bookings. Show Status Badge (Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled).
pages.owner_dashboard: Sidebar navigation. Main area uses Control Room Grid. Top row: Stat cards (Total PGs, Active Tenants). Below: Recent booking requests.
pages.owner_add_pg: Clean scrolling form using Shadcn. Sections for Basic Details, Pricing, Amenities (checkboxes), and Image Upload placeholder UI.
pages.owner_bookings: Data table of incoming bookings using Shadcn Table. Actions: Approve / Reject.
pages.admin_dashboard: Similar to Owner Dashboard but wider scope. Tables for 'Pending PG Approvals' and 'All Users'. Strict, clean, data-dense design.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='pg-card-book-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Project is React + Vite + Tailwind + Shadcn UI. Use .jsx/.js files, NO TypeScript.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Configure 'Cabinet Grotesk' or 'Outfit' for headings in tailwind.config.js.
Implement Shadcn UI for structured components (Forms, Tables, Dialogs) but heavily customize them to remove the 'Vercel look' - make them rounder, softer, and tint borders with emerald.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (Home hero, bento grids). Do not use Shadcn 'Card' for complex bento layouts, use raw divs.
All data must be mock data stored in localStorage or hardcoded state. Implement a dummy Auth context that toggles between User/Owner/Admin roles.
Never use placeholder image services. ONLY use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs in this JSON.
